results.name: cycle-mmq-cateran-recruiter
results.description: A double vertical cycle of six Mercenaires from Mercadian Masques. Each one has the Mercenary recruiting ability  with converted mana costs from 1 to 6.

results.name: cycle-mmq-ramosian-recruiter
results.description: A cycle of five Rebels from Mercadian Masques. Each one has the Rebel recruiting ability searching for converted mana costs from 2 to 6.

results.name: cycle-morphling
results.description: The "true" cycle of morphlings. See also [morphling](morphling) for similar cards.

results.name: cycle-mrd-artifact-land
results.description: The artifact lands from the Mirrodin block.

results.name: cycle-nightscape-vertical
results.description: Black cycle of an Apprentice and Master from Invasion and a Familiar and Battlemage from Planeshift.

results.name: cycle-nonmana-land
results.description: Cycles of lands that don't create mana.
